suite.description: Golden-path agent governance regression suite. Cases tagged `tier: smoke` are the L1 pre-merge subset (≤ ~90s) covering the 3 typical AI mistake categories: 错读路径 / 业务逻辑落到编排层 / UI 文案落到 src/ai/messages/. All other cases default to `tier: full` and run via `check:agent-evals` / `:trace`.

cases.name: TypeScript typecheck (smoke: catches 错读路径 via broken imports)
architecture-guard core (smoke: catches 业务逻辑落到编排层)
cases.stdout: [check-architecture-guard] OK: guarded files stayed within architecture ceilings.

cases.name: src/ai/messages 与 i18n dictKeys 分层 (smoke: UI 文案 vs formatter 文案分层)
cases.stdout: [check-ai-messages-isolation] OK: src/ai/messages/ keeps formatter copy isolated from UI i18n.
